metadata.description: Deploys AI Landing Zone with Fabric capacity extension
Friendly name of the workload profile.
Type of the workload profile.
Minimum number of nodes for the workload profile.
Maximum number of nodes for the workload profile.
Information about a workload profile for the environment.
Name of the Azure Developer CLI environment.
Azure region for resources.
Azure region for Cosmos DB.
Principal ID for role assignments.
Principal type for role assignments.
Tags for all resources.
App Configuration label.
Enable network isolation.
Use an existing VNet.
Existing VNet resource ID.
Subnet names.
VNet address prefixes.
Subnet address prefixes.
Feature flags.
Existing resource IDs to reuse.
Optional additional Entra object IDs to grant Search roles.
Identity options.
Resource naming token.
Short base name for resource naming.
Resource names.
Model deployments and container app configuration.
Miscellaneous settings.
Deploy Fabric capacity
Fabric capacity mode. Use create to provision a capacity, byo to reuse an existing capacity, or none to disable Fabric capacity.
Optional. Existing Fabric capacity resource ID (required when fabricCapacityMode=byo).
Fabric workspace mode. Use create to create a workspace in postprovision, byo to reuse an existing workspace, or none to disable Fabric workspace automation.
Optional. Existing Fabric workspace ID (GUID) (required when fabricWorkspaceMode=byo).
Optional. Existing Fabric workspace name (used when fabricWorkspaceMode=byo).
Fabric capacity SKU
Fabric capacity admin members
Optional. Existing Purview account resource ID
Optional. Existing Purview collection name
Optional. Created by user name.
Deploy PostgreSQL Flexible Server.
PostgreSQL Flexible Server name.
Enable network isolation for PostgreSQL (private DNS + private endpoint).
Allow connections from Azure services to the PostgreSQL server when public access is enabled. This creates the 0.0.0.0 firewall rule equivalent to the portal Allow Azure services setting.
Create and link the PostgreSQL private DNS zone to the VNet.
Optional override for the PostgreSQL private DNS VNet link name.
PostgreSQL admin username.
PostgreSQL admin password.
Store PostgreSQL admin password in Key Vault.
Key Vault secret name for PostgreSQL admin password.
PostgreSQL role name for Fabric mirroring.
Key Vault secret name for the Fabric mirroring PostgreSQL role password.
Credential mode used for the Fabric PostgreSQL connection. Use fabricUser for the production-oriented least-privilege path or admin for a simplified demo automation path.
Authentication configuration for PostgreSQL Flexible Server. Defaults to both Microsoft Entra and password authentication enabled so Fabric mirroring can be configured immediately after deployment.
PostgreSQL SKU name (tier + family + cores).
PostgreSQL tier aligned with SKU.
PostgreSQL availability zone. -1 means no zone preference.
PostgreSQL high availability mode.
PostgreSQL high availability standby zone. -1 means no zone preference.
PostgreSQL version.
PostgreSQL storage size in GB.
Generated value used when postgreSqlAdminPassword is left as the placeholder token.

variables.effectiveFabricWorkspaceName: [if(equals(variables('effectiveFabricWorkspaceMode'), 'byo'), if(not(empty(parameters('fabricWorkspaceName'))), parameters('fabricWorkspaceName'), if(not(empty(parameters('environmentName'))), format('workspace-{0}', parameters('environmentName')), format('workspace-{0}', parameters('baseName')))), if(not(empty(parameters('environmentName'))), format('workspace-{0}', parameters('environmentName')), format('workspace-{0}', parameters('baseName'))))]

properties.tags: [union(parameters('deploymentTags'), createObject('TemplateName', 'Deploy Your AI Application in Prod', 'Type', if(parameters('networkIsolation'), 'WAF', 'Non-WAF'), 'CreatedBy', parameters('createdBy'), 'DeploymentName', deployment().name))]

metadata.name: DBforPostgreSQL Flexible Servers
metadata.description: This module deploys a DBforPostgreSQL Flexible Server.
The name of the private endpoint.
The resource ID of the private endpoint.
The group Id for the private endpoint Group.
FQDN that resolves to private endpoint IP address.
A list of private IP addresses of the private endpoint.
The custom DNS configurations of the private endpoint.
The IDs of the network interfaces associated with the private endpoint.
Conditional. Sets the promote mode for a replica server. This is a write only property. Required if enabling replication.
Conditional. Sets the promote options for a replica server. This is a write only property. Required if enabling replication.
Conditional. Used to indicate role of the server in replication set. Required if enabling replication.
The type of replication settings for the server. Can only be set on existing flexible servers.
Required. The objectId of the Active Directory administrator.
Required. Active Directory administrator principal name.
Required. The principal type used to represent the type of Active Directory Administrator.
Optional. The tenantId of the Active Directory administrator.
The type of an administrator.
Required. The name of the PostgreSQL flexible server Firewall Rule.
Required. The start IP address of the firewall rule. Must be IPv4 format. Use value '0.0.0.0' for all Azure-internal IP addresses.
Required. The end IP address of the firewall rule. Must be IPv4 format. Must be greater than or equal to startIpAddress. Use value '0.0.0.0' for all Azure-internal IP addresses.
The type of a firewall rule.
Optional. FQDN that resolves to private endpoint IP address.
Required. A list of private IP addresses of the private endpoint.
Required. The name of the resource that is unique within a resource group.
Required. The ID of a group obtained from the remote resource that this private endpoint should connect to.
Required. The member name of a group obtained from the remote resource that this private endpoint should connect to.
Required. A private IP address obtained from the private endpoint's subnet.
Required. Properties of private endpoint IP configurations.
Optional. The name of the Private DNS Zone Group.
Optional. The name of the private DNS Zone Group config.
Required. The resource id of the private DNS zone.
Required. The private DNS Zone Groups to associate the Private Endpoint. A DNS Zone Group can support up to 5 DNS zones.
Required. The resource ID of a key vault to reference a customer managed key for encryption from.
Required. The name of the customer managed key to use for encryption.
Optional. The version of the customer managed key to reference for encryption. If not provided, using version as per 'autoRotationEnabled' setting.
Optional. Enable or disable auto-rotating to the latest key version. Default is `true`. If set to `false`, the latest key version at the time of the deployment is used.
Optional. User assigned identity to use when fetching the customer managed key. Required if no system assigned identity is available for use.
An AVM-aligned type for a customer-managed key. To be used if the resource type supports auto-rotation of the customer-managed key.
Optional. The name of the diagnostic setting.
Optional. Name of a Diagnostic Log category for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set the specific logs to collect here.
Optional. Name of a Diagnostic Log category group for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set to `allLogs` to collect all logs.
Optional. Enable or disable the category explicitly. Default is `true`.
Optional. The name of logs that will be streamed. "allLogs" includes all possible logs for the resource. Set to `[]` to disable log collection.
Required. Name of a Diagnostic Metric category for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set to `AllMetrics` to collect all metrics.
Optional. Enable or disable the category explicitly. Default is `true`.
Optional. The name of metrics that will be streamed. "allMetrics" includes all possible metrics for the resource. Set to `[]` to disable metric collection.
Optional. A string indicating whether the export to Log Analytics should use the default destination type, i.e. AzureDiagnostics, or use a destination type.

Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic log analytics workspace. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.

Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic storage account. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.
Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic event hub authorization rule for the Event Hubs namespace in which the event hub should be created or streamed to.

Optional. Name of the diagnostic event hub within the namespace to which logs are streamed. Without this, an event hub is created for each log category. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.
Optional. The full ARM resource ID of the Marketplace resource to which you would like to send Diagnostic Logs.
An AVM-aligned type for a diagnostic setting. To be used if both logs & metrics are supported by the resource provider.
Optional. Specify the name of lock.
Optional. Specify the type of lock.
Optional. Specify the notes of the lock.
An AVM-aligned type for a lock.
Optional. Enables system assigned managed identity on the resource.
Optional. The resource ID(s) to assign to the resource. Required if a user assigned identity is used for encryption.
An AVM-aligned type for a managed identity configuration. To be used if both a system-assigned & user-assigned identities are supported by the resource provider.
Optional. The name of the Private Endpoint.
Optional. The location to deploy the Private Endpoint to.
Optional. The name of the private link connection to create.
Optional. The subresource to deploy the Private Endpoint for. For example "vault" for a Key Vault Private Endpoint.
Required. Resource ID of the subnet where the endpoint needs to be created.
Optional. The resource ID of the Resource Group the Private Endpoint will be created in. If not specified, the Resource Group of the provided Virtual Network Subnet is used.
Optional. The private DNS Zone Group to configure for the Private Endpoint.
Optional. If Manual Private Link Connection is required.
Optional. A message passed to the owner of the remote resource with the manual connection request.
Optional. Custom DNS configurations.
Optional. A list of IP configurations of the Private Endpoint. This will be used to map to the first-party Service endpoints.
Optional. Application security groups in which the Private Endpoint IP configuration is included.
Optional. The custom name of the network interface attached to the Private Endpoint.
Optional. Specify the type of lock.
Optional. Array of role assignments to create.
Optional. Tags to be applied on all resources/Resource Groups in this deployment.
Optional. Enable/Disable usage telemetry for module.

An AVM-aligned type for a private endpoint. To be used if the private endpoint's default service / groupId can be assumed (i.e., for services that only have one Private Endpoint type like 'vault' for key vault).
Optional. The name (as GUID) of the role assignment. If not provided, a GUID will be generated.

Required. The role to assign. You can provide either the display name of the role definition, the role definition GUID, or its fully qualified ID in the following format: '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/c2f4ef07-c644-48eb-af81-4b1b4947fb11'.
Required. The principal ID of the principal (user/group/identity) to assign the role to.
Optional. The principal type of the assigned principal ID.
Optional. The description of the role assignment.

Optional. The conditions on the role assignment. This limits the resources it can be assigned to. e.g.: @Resource[Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers:ContainerName] StringEqualsIgnoreCase "foo_storage_container".
Optional. Version of the condition.
Optional. The Resource Id of the delegated managed identity resource.
An AVM-aligned type for a role assignment.
Required. The name of the PostgreSQL flexible server.
Optional. The administrator login name of the server. Can only be specified when the PostgreSQL server is being created.
Optional. The administrator login password.
Optional. The Azure AD administrators when AAD authentication enabled.
Optional. The authentication configuration for the server.
Optional. Location for all resources.
Required. The name of the sku, typically, tier + family + cores, e.g. Standard_D4s_v3.
Required. The tier of the particular SKU. Tier must align with the 'skuName' property. Example, tier cannot be 'Burstable' if skuName is 'Standard_D4s_v3'.

Required. If set to 1, 2 or 3, the availability zone is hardcoded to that value. If set to -1, no zone is defined. Note that the availability zone numbers here are the logical availability zone in your Azure subscription. Different subscriptions might have a different mapping of the physical zone and logical zone. To understand more, please refer to [Physical and logical availability zones](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/reliability/availability-zones-overview?tabs=azure-cli#physical-and-logical-availability-zones).

Optional. Standby availability zone information of the server. If set to 1, 2 or 3, the availability zone is hardcoded to that value. If set to -1, no zone is defined. Default will have no preference set.
Optional. The mode for high availability.
Optional. Backup retention days for the server.
Optional. A value indicating whether Geo-Redundant backup is enabled on the server. Should be disabled if 'cMKKeyName' is not empty.
Optional. Max storage allowed for a server.
Optional. Flag to enable / disable Storage Auto grow for flexible server.
Optional. PostgreSQL Server version.
Optional. The mode to create a new PostgreSQL server.
Conditional. The managed identity definition for this resource. Required if 'cMKKeyName' is not empty.
Optional. Specifies the state of the Threat Protection, whether it is enabled or disabled or a state has not been applied yet on the specific server.
Optional. The customer managed key definition.
Optional. Properties for the maintenence window. If provided, 'customWindow' property must exist and set to 'Enabled'.
Conditional. Required if 'createMode' is set to 'PointInTimeRestore'.
Conditional. Required if 'createMode' is set to 'PointInTimeRestore'.
Optional. Delegated subnet arm resource ID. Used when the desired connectivity mode is 'Private Access' - virtual network integration.

Optional. Private dns zone arm resource ID. Used when the desired connectivity mode is 'Private Access' and required when 'delegatedSubnetResourceId' is used. The Private DNS Zone must be linked to the Virtual Network referenced in 'delegatedSubnetResourceId'.
Optional. The firewall rules to create in the PostgreSQL flexible server.
Optional. Determines whether or not public network access is enabled or disabled.
Optional. The databases to create in the server.
Optional. The configurations to create in the server.
Optional. The lock settings of the service.
Optional. The replication settings for the server. Can only be set on existing flexible servers.
Optional. The replication role for the server.
Optional. Enable/Disable advanced threat protection.
Optional. Array of role assignments to create.
Optional. Tags of the resource.
Optional. Enable/Disable usage telemetry for module.
Optional. The diagnostic settings of the service.
Optional. Configuration details for private endpoints. Used when the desired connectivity mode is 'Public Access' and 'delegatedSubnetResourceId' is NOT used.

variables.formattedUserAssignedIdentities: [reduce(map(coalesce(tryGet(parameters('managedIdentities'), 'userAssignedResourceIds'), createArray()), lambda('id', createObject(format('{0}', lambdaVariables('id')), createObject()))), createObject(), lambda('cur', 'next', union(lambdaVariables('cur'), lambdaVariables('next'))))]

properties.dataEncryption: [if(not(empty(parameters('customerManagedKey'))), createObject('primaryKeyURI', if(not(empty(tryGet(parameters('customerManagedKey'), 'keyVersion'))), if(not(variables('isHSMManagedCMK')), format('{0}/{1}', reference('cMKKeyVault::cMKKey').keyUri, parameters('customerManagedKey').keyVersion), format('https://{0}.managedhsm.azure.net/keys/{1}/{2}', last(split(tryGet(parameters('customerManagedKey'), 'keyVaultResourceId'), '/')), parameters('customerManagedKey').keyName, parameters('customerManagedKey').keyVersion)), if(coalesce(tryGet(parameters('customerManagedKey'), 'autoRotationEnabled'), true()), if(not(variables('isHSMManagedCMK')), reference('cMKKeyVault::cMKKey').keyUri, format('https://{0}.managedhsm.azure.net/keys/{1}', last(split(tryGet(parameters('customerManagedKey'), 'keyVaultResourceId'), '/')), parameters('customerManagedKey').keyName)), if(not(variables('isHSMManagedCMK')), reference('cMKKeyVault::cMKKey').keyUriWithVersion, fail('Managed HSM CMK encryption requires either specifying the ''keyVersion'' or omitting the ''autoRotationEnabled'' property. Setting ''autoRotationEnabled'' to false without a ''keyVersion'' is not allowed.')))), 'primaryUserAssignedIdentityId', tryGet(parameters('customerManagedKey'), 'userAssignedIdentityResourceId'), 'type', 'AzureKeyVault'), null())]
properties.network: [if(and(not(empty(parameters('delegatedSubnetResourceId'))), empty(parameters('firewallRules'))), createObject('delegatedSubnetResourceId', parameters('delegatedSubnetResourceId'), 'privateDnsZoneArmResourceId', parameters('privateDnsZoneArmResourceId'), 'publicNetworkAccess', parameters('publicNetworkAccess')), createObject('publicNetworkAccess', parameters('publicNetworkAccess')))]

properties.notes: [coalesce(tryGet(parameters('lock'), 'notes'), if(equals(tryGet(parameters('lock'), 'kind'), 'CanNotDelete'), 'Cannot delete resource or child resources.', 'Cannot delete or modify the resource or child resources.'))]

metadata.name: DBforPostgreSQL Flexible Server Databases
metadata.description: This module deploys a DBforPostgreSQL Flexible Server Database.

Optional. The charset of the database.

metadata.name: DBforPostgreSQL Flexible Server Firewall Rules
metadata.description: This module deploys a DBforPostgreSQL Flexible Server Firewall Rule.
Required. The name of the PostgreSQL flexible server Firewall Rule.
Required. The start IP address of the firewall rule. Must be IPv4 format. Use value '0.0.0.0' for all Azure-internal IP addresses.
Required. The end IP address of the firewall rule. Must be IPv4 format. Must be greater than or equal to startIpAddress. Use value '0.0.0.0' for all Azure-internal IP addresses.
Conditional. The name of the parent PostgreSQL flexible server. Required if the template is used in a standalone deployment.
The name of the deployed firewall rule.
The resource ID of the deployed firewall rule.
The resource group of the deployed firewall rule.

Optional. Value of the configuration.

metadata.description: This module deploys a DBforPostgreSQL Advanced Threat Protection.

The resource id of the advanced threat protection state for the flexible server.

The resource group of the deployed administrator.

parameters.privateLinkServiceConnections: [if(not(equals(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('privateEndpoints'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'isManualConnection'), true())), createObject('value', createArray(createObject('name', coalesce(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('privateEndpoints'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'privateLinkServiceConnectionName'), format('{0}-{1}-{2}', last(split(resourceId('Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL/flexibleServers', parameters('name')), '/')), coalesce(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('privateEndpoints'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'service'), 'postgresqlServer'), copyIndex())), 'properties', createObject('privateLinkServiceId', resourceId('Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL/flexibleServers', parameters('name')), 'groupIds', createArray(coalesce(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('privateEndpoints'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'service'), 'postgresqlServer')))))), createObject('value', null()))]
parameters.manualPrivateLinkServiceConnections: [if(equals(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('privateEndpoints'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'isManualConnection'), true()), createObject('value', createArray(createObject('name', coalesce(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('privateEndpoints'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'privateLinkServiceConnectionName'), format('{0}-{1}-{2}', last(split(resourceId('Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL/flexibleServers', parameters('name')), '/')), coalesce(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('privateEndpoints'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'service'), 'postgresqlServer'), copyIndex())), 'properties', createObject('privateLinkServiceId', resourceId('Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL/flexibleServers', parameters('name')), 'groupIds', createArray(coalesce(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('privateEndpoints'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'service'), 'postgresqlServer')), 'requestMessage', coalesce(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('privateEndpoints'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'manualConnectionRequestMessage'), 'Manual approval required.'))))), createObject('value', null()))]
